page_content:
CMSC498 Selected Topics in Computer Science (1-3 Credits)

An individualized course designed to allow a student or students to pursue a selected topic not taught as a part of the regular course offerings under the supervision of a Computer Science faculty member.

In addition, courses dealing with topics of special interest and/or new emerging areas of computer science will be offered with this number. Selected topics courses will be structured very much like a regular course with homework, project and exams. Credit according to work completed Restriction: Permission of CMNS-Computer Science department.
